The American musician, singer-songwriter, and multi-instrumentalist from Berklee College of Music that Jonny Browning collaborated with is **St. Vincent**.

**Reasoning:**  
Jonny Browning is described as a "touring guitarist Victor Vector for the band Man or Astro-Man?" and has played with several bands, including **St. Vincent**. He is also noted as having played with **The Polyphonic Spree**, **Drive-By Truckers**, and **The Man Made Brain**, among others. St. Vincent is explicitly mentioned as a band he has worked with, confirming his collaboration with this musician.
